88=Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
684 GG0170S2_WHEEL_150_GOAL_CD GG0170S2_WHEEL_150_GOAL_CD GG0170S2 Mobility: Goal to Wheel at Least 150 Feet by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to wheel the wheelchair or scooter at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space by
the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
